fields.label: Tenant
fields.description: Tenant this Keycloak configuration belongs to

fields.label: Tenant Name
fields.description: Auto-filled from Tenant

fields.label: SSO Enabled
fields.description: Enable or disable Keycloak SSO for this tenant

fields.label: Debug Mode
fields.description: Enable debug mode for SSO operations (logs to console)

fields.label: Server URL
fields.description: Keycloak server URL (e.g., https://keycloak.example.com). Note: Do NOT include /auth/ suffix - it will be added automatically for older Keycloak versions

fields.label: Keycloak Version
fields.description: Keycloak version determines URL path format. Version 18+ does not use /auth/ prefix

fields.label: Realm Name
fields.description: Keycloak realm name (e.g., trade-hub-realm)

fields.label: OpenID Configuration URL
fields.description: Auto-generated OpenID Connect discovery URL

fields.label: Client ID
fields.description: OAuth2 client ID registered in Keycloak

fields.label: Client Secret
fields.description: OAuth2 client secret (not required for public clients)

fields.label: Public Client
fields.description: Enable for browser-based apps without client secret

fields.label: PKCE Enabled
fields.description: Enable Proof Key for Code Exchange (recommended for public clients)

fields.label: Access Token Lifespan (seconds)
fields.description: Access token validity period in seconds (default: 300 = 5 minutes)

fields.label: Refresh Token Lifespan (seconds)
fields.description: Refresh token validity period in seconds (default: 1800 = 30 minutes)

fields.label: Offline Sessions Enabled
fields.description: Allow offline access tokens for long-running sessions

fields.label: Offline Session Idle Timeout (seconds)
fields.description: Offline session idle timeout in seconds (default: 2592000 = 30 days)

fields.label: Auto Create Users
fields.description: Automatically create Frappe user when Keycloak user logs in

fields.label: Auto Update User Info
fields.description: Update Frappe user info from Keycloak on each login

fields.label: Sync User Roles
fields.description: Synchronize user roles from Keycloak to Frappe

fields.label: Sync Interval (minutes)
fields.description: Interval for background user role synchronization

fields.label: Default Frappe Roles
fields.description: Comma-separated list of default Frappe roles for new users (e.g., Customer, Website User)

fields.label: Keycloak Seller Role Name
fields.description: Keycloak role name that maps to Seller in Trade Hub

fields.label: Keycloak Buyer Role Name
fields.description: Keycloak role name that maps to Buyer in Trade Hub

fields.label: Email Attribute
fields.description: Keycloak attribute name for email

fields.label: First Name Attribute
fields.description: Keycloak attribute name for first name

fields.label: Last Name Attribute
fields.description: Keycloak attribute name for last name

fields.label: Phone Attribute
fields.description: Keycloak attribute name for phone number

fields.label: Tenant Attribute
fields.description: Keycloak attribute name for tenant ID (for multi-tenant support)

fields.label: User Type Attribute
fields.description: Keycloak attribute name for user type (buyer/seller)

fields.label: Admin API Credentials
fields.description: Credentials for Keycloak Admin REST API (required for user management)

fields.label: Admin Username
fields.description: Keycloak admin username for Admin REST API

fields.label: Admin Password
fields.description: Keycloak admin password

fields.label: Admin Client ID
fields.description: Client ID for admin API access (usually admin-cli)

fields.label: Admin Client Secret
fields.description: Client secret for admin API access (if using confidential client)

fields.label: Redirect URI
fields.description: OAuth2 redirect URI after authentication (must match Keycloak client config exactly)

fields.label: Post Logout Redirect URI
fields.description: Redirect URI after logout

fields.label: Allowed Redirect URIs
fields.description: Additional allowed redirect URIs (one per line) for multi-domain support

fields.label: Enable Google Login
fields.description: Allow users to login via Google (must be configured in Keycloak)

fields.label: Enable Facebook Login
fields.description: Allow users to login via Facebook (must be configured in Keycloak)

fields.label: Enable Apple Login
fields.description: Allow users to login via Apple (must be configured in Keycloak)

fields.label: Enable LinkedIn Login
fields.description: Allow users to login via LinkedIn (must be configured in Keycloak)

fields.label: Signature Algorithm
fields.options:
RS256
RS384
RS512
ES256
ES384
ES512
fields.description: JWT signature algorithm (must match Keycloak realm settings)

fields.label: Token Endpoint Auth Method
fields.description: Method to authenticate to token endpoint

fields.label: Verify SSL
fields.description: Verify SSL certificates (disable only for development)

fields.label: Connection Timeout (seconds)
fields.description: Timeout for Keycloak API requests

fields.label: Connection Status
fields.description: Current connection status to Keycloak server

fields.label: Last Connection Test
fields.description: Last time the Keycloak connection was tested

fields.label: Last User Sync
fields.description: Last time user roles were synchronized from Keycloak

fields.label: Total Users Synced
fields.description: Total number of users synchronized with Keycloak
